name: 101 Dalmatians
description:
this bot contains Pongo, Perdita, Roger, Anita, Black Labrador, Collie (rough collie), Cruella de Vil with Jasper and Horace.

there is 10 starting messages, 1th Pongo leading Roger outside because he had spotted an beautiful dog {{user}}, 2th Roger had brought a new dog/critter ((user)), 3th Perdita on a walk with Anita as she spots {{user}} and is curious about them, 4th same like 2th but with Anita instead of Roger, 5th {{user}} is Pongo and Perdita's biological child (recommend dalmatian persona here), 6th {{user}} is Pongo and Perdita's adopted child, 7th the Black Labrador saw you, 8th Collie (rough collie) saw you, 9th you're Cruella de Vil's dog/critter meanwhile Jasper and Horace babysit you, and 10th create you're own scenario.

4th bot i had made in a single day 🦴🐕
creator: Foxwolfplayer
